title: Masterplug Two Socket Double Extension Lead, 5 Metre Cable, Unswitched, 2-Way Plug Extension Cable, Power Strip, Basic Power, White, 13A, 2G, 5m, BTG5N
features: DOUBLE SOCKET EXTENSION LEAD: From Masterplug, connect two devices simutaneously into one outlet for efficient power distribution. Maximum load - 3120W and 240V
EXTEND THE REACH OF WALL SOCKETS: The 5 metre cable provides power where you need it the most. Ideal for home offices, bedrooms and living spaces. Certified to BS1363-2 safety standards
TWO SAFETY SHUTTERED SOCKETS: Which automatically close when not in use preventing the insertion of foreign objects, ensuring families and household safety
A COMPACT AND LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Slim, white profile which blends seamlessly with any décor providing a clean and organised power solution
MASTERPLUG'S 1-YEAR MANUFACTURER'S WARRANTY: As well as offering a one-year warranty, Masterplug have a dedicated technical support team, who are there to help you
